cards.back: A type of neural machine translation model that uses an encoder to encode the input and a decoder to generate the output
Scenarios where the available training data is limited, making it difficult to train high-quality machine translation models
Machine translation models that perpetuate existing biases in the source language, such as sexism or racism, due to the training data
Metrics used to assess the quality of machine translation models, such as BLEU score, ROUGE score, and METEOR score
Techniques used to improve machine translation performance in low-resource situations, such as using pre-trained models and transfer learning
